notes: porsche.com/usa/models/<model> consumer site. Performance variants (911 GT3, GT3 RS, Turbo S, Spirit 70) live under /911/ tree. Taycan/Macan EV variants live alongside ICE. Cayenne Electric is the BEV variant. Phase B (2026-05-14): URL check found the site restructured to /usa/models/<series>/<group>-models/<model>/ (or bare /usa/models/<series>/ for the series landing page); the old <series>/<thing>-models/ family-suffix URLs now 404. Updated 14 of 16 URLs to the new pattern, all validated OK via check_urls.mjs except the 3 flagged below. taycan-cross-turismo family page is gone (404); repointed to the taycan-4-cross-turismo variant page (OK) as the representative Cross Turismo body-style page. FLAGGED FOR HUMAN REVIEW: 911-gt3-rs, 718-cayman-gt4-rs, 718-spyder-rs -- their search-confirmed canonical 3-segment URLs (.../<series>/<model>/<model>/) are real indexed pages matching the site pattern, but the checker's bot request is redirected to porsche.com/usa homepage (bot-gating on those deep RS paths). The old config URLs for these 3 were confirmed hard 404, so they were updated to the search-confirmed canonical URLs rather than left dead, but a human/browser should confirm they render.
